prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TENSTAKE-12PC-ORANGE Product Type: ANCHOR_STAKE Brand (from catalog): GENERIC Existing Title: 12-Piece Galvanized Steel Tent Pegs - Orange Garden Stakes Description: Before you pack your camping gear for your next outdoor adventure, be sure to grab a handful of the glow in the Dark 10-Piece Galvanized Steel Tent Pegs. Easy to install, durable, versatile and easy to spot at night or in low light conditions due to the glow in the dark topper, these heavy-duty tent pegs will soon become a staple in your backpacking, trekking and camping gear.

The tent stakes feature sharp square-pointed tips, a twisted metal body design, large heavy-duty PVC toppers and a stringing eyelet on top of the plastic topper for anchoring versatility. The tent stakes feature a deliberate twisted metal body design that easily penetrates everything from hard packed soil to grass and sand; the tent pegs will hold strong against bad weather or heavy winds wherever you need to secure a canopy, tent, pergola or overhead covering.

In addition to the functional twisted metal design feature, the tent pegs are constructed from durable and long-lasting galvanized steel, meaning a protective zinc coating is placed over top of the steel in order to prevent rusting or corrosion. The tent peg material is incredibly sturdy and rust-resistant, sure to last you through many camping seasons and backpacking adventures to come. Plus, the large topper makes hammering easy and, because the PVC toppers glow in the dark easily maintain, fix or adjust the tent stakes without a flashlight or headlamp.

Whether installing a tent, grow tent, canopy, camping tent, beach tent, pop up tent, tarp tent, pergola or overhead covering for a wedding, picnic, sporting event or other, the tent stakes can handle all of the aforementioned, and with the handy stringing eyelet on top of the plastic topper, installation will be a breeze.

Available Pack Sizes: 4, 8, 10 or 20 Stakes

SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 10.5 inches; Thickness: 7mm; Material: Galvanized High Carbon Steel Search Terms: tent pegs or stakes heavy duty metal backpacking glow in the dark camping for tenttent grow canopy beach pop up 2 person instant play 4 bed kids fan 6 truck rooftop party canvas kit complete 3 cabin season cot teepee poles heater screen one cat Features: - CAMPING GEAR ESSENTIAL: The camping tent stakes are an essential item to pack with your camping gear; the tent stakes feature sharp square-pointed tips, twisted metal body design, large heavy-duty PVC stoppers and a stringing eyelet on top of the plastic stopper for anchoring versatility and easy installation - steel rod with galvanized finish for superior rust-resistance - Lightweight strength - each peg weighs just 1 ounce - great for camping - DURABLE GALVANIZED STEEL: The tent stakes to tent pegs are constructed from galvanized steel, meaning a protective zinc coating is placed over top of the steel in order to prevent any rusting or corrosion; the tent pegs material is incredibly durable and sturdy, sure to last through many camping seasons and backpacking adventures - MULTIPURPOSE TENT STAKE: Whether you are installing a tent, grow tent, canopy, camping tent, beach tent, pop up tent, tarp tent, pergola or overhead covering for a wedding, picnic, sporting event or other, the tent stakes can handle all of it and with the handy stringing eyelet on top of the plastic stopper, installation will be a breeze === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
